name: claudeos
description: ClaudeOS — a single-operator control surface for running ~20 independent Claude Code sessions in isolated git worktrees. SCAN->TRIAGE->RANK->DECIDE->LEARN pipeline. (Internal identifiers/paths keep the legacy 'cockpit' name; only branding is ClaudeOS.)

scripts.postinstall: git config core.hooksPath scripts/git-hooks 2>/dev/null || true; chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath scripts/git-hooks && echo 'git hooks active (pre-commit build + pre-push tests)'
scripts.start:xvfb: npm run build && xvfb-run -a electron --no-sandbox dist/main/main.js
scripts.demo:serve: npm run build && COCKPIT_DEMO=1 COCKPIT_PORT=4318 node dist/server/server.js
scripts.purge-demo: npm run build && node dist/cli.js purge-demo
